overridableConfigKeys.label: Atoms
overridableConfigKeys.description: 16 particles — 8 red gas A on the left, 8 blue gas B on the right — random-walk and mix over time.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels; bounds the random walk.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick random-walks every atom; toggle to start/pause diffusion.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds the random walk.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-chemistry / DiffusionOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

atoms.description: 16 particles — 8 red gas A on the left, 8 blue gas B on the right — random-walk and mix over time.

height.description: Simulation height in pixels; bounds the random walk.

running.description: When true the tick random-walks every atom; toggle to start/pause diffusion.

width.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds the random walk.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Atoms
overridableConfigKeys.description: Six large purple solute (S) atoms confined right of the membrane plus twelve small blue water (W) atoms that cross freely; water biases rightward each tick, so it accumulates on the solute side.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation height in pixels; bounds the random walk.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick random-walks every atom; toggle to start/pause osmosis.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Shapes
overridableConfigKeys.description: The vertical semipermeable membrane down the canvas middle (x=width/2); solute cannot cross it, water can.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels; the membrane sits at width/2.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-chemistry / OsmosisOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

height.description: Simulation height in pixels; bounds the random walk.

running.description: When true the tick random-walks every atom; toggle to start/pause osmosis.

shapes.description: The vertical semipermeable membrane down the canvas middle (x=width/2); solute cannot cross it, water can.

width.description: Simulation width in pixels; the membrane sits at width/2.

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Atoms
overridableConfigKeys.description: Eight atoms — four red A on the left and four blue B on the right; each pair slides to the center (width/2) to bond, then back to its home to dissociate.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bonds
overridableConfigKeys.description: Four A-B bonds — the canvas draws a line between each pair whose length shrinks as the atoms converge and grows as they separate.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Period
overridableConfigKeys.description: Phase units per full bond form-and-break cycle; larger is slower.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick oscillates each pair between dissociated and bonded; toggle to start/pause.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas width in pixels; the bond center is width/2.
